blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 381 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 57 mph may cause lift holds.
